sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65744" key="meirakiei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειρᾰκῐ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boyish mischief</tr_>, prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicur.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Sent.Palat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5p.69</biblScope> </bibl> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> d. M.</sense> </entryFree>
